identity.vocalStyle: Clean male duo vocals with call-and-response energy
identity.styleSentence: A laid-back early-90s East Coast boom-bap track at roughly 88 BPM featuring thick funky electric bass grooves with melodic slides, loose dusty drum swing, warm Rhodes chords, occasional horn stabs, subtle vinyl crackle, and classic DJ scratches in the hook.
identity.summary: A dusty, laid-back boom-bap track that deconstructs a complex family tree of 'clones' and identity thieves within political or corporate circles.

keywords.emotion: Deceptive danger lurking in plain sight
keywords.imageryPrompt: a close-up of a dusty, patterned snake coiled around an old film reel camera, eyes reflecting green data streams

keywords.emotion: Uncanny valley replication of human souls
keywords.imageryPrompt: three silhouettes standing in perfect alignment but with slightly different facial expressions and shadows, emerging from a dark foggy jungle background

keywords.emotion: Ancient wisdom witnessing the cycle of lies
keywords.imagingPrompt: a gnarled oak tree trunk covered in moss and rusted metal tags with faces carved into it, standing against a twilight sky filled with smoke

keywords.emotion: The cold eye of surveillance recording the truth
keywords.imageryPrompt: an old-fashioned red Kodak camera lens glowing softly in the center of a dark room, capturing reflections of faces that do not match reality

keywords.imagingPrompt: a small fire burning inside a glass cage made of ice, illuminating the smoke with angry orange and red hues while freezing tears on a nearby surface

keywords.emotion: Hidden identity hiding behind borrowed faces
keywords.imageryPrompt: a smooth porcelain mask resting on a pile of discarded newspaper clippings, casting long distorted shadows that look like screaming mouths
